chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1276 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-15921/2016 2. For orders on office objection 3. For katcha peshi. 11.11.2016. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = Mr. Aijaz Bhutto, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Nauman Sahito, Advocate for petitioner, who is reported to be busy before another bench. In the intervening period, the learned A.A.G has filed his parawise comments, whereunder it has been mentioned that FIR No.63/2012, which was registered against respondents No.6 & 7 and the challans have been submitted before the concerned Court. According to parawise comments filed on behalf of respondent No.2-SSP Tando Allahyar, the respondent No.7-Ilyas S/o Ibrahim, who is the co-accused is absconding. In these circumstances, the petition is disposed of with the directions that respondents are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner, with further directions to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law, if they are approached with such a request and official respondents should make concerted efforts to arrest the remaining co-accused, so that law abiding citizen is saved and protected from the illegal acts of such persons. JUDGE Shahid
